articles.title: Watch: David Pastrnak keeps Bruins’ season alive with OT goal in Game 5 vs. Buffalo
articles.description:
Pastrnak's OT goal forced a Game 6 between the Bruins and Sabres on Friday night at TD Garden.

articles.title: Trey Yesavage has a sharp season debut as Blue Jays beat Red Sox 3-0
articles.description:
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. added an RBI single as Toronto stopped Boston’s season-best winning streak at three games and handed Red Sox interim manager Chad Tracy his first loss since replacing Alex Cora, who was fired on Saturday.

The post Trey Yesavage has a sharp season debut as Blue Jays beat Red Sox 3-0 appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Joel Embiid scores 33 as 76ers beat Celtics 113-97 in Game 5 to keep their season alive
articles.description:
Game 6 is back in Philadelphia on Thursday night, when the Sixers will try to force the series to a decisive seventh game in Boston on Saturday.

articles.title: Terry Francona reacts to Alex Cora being fired by Red Sox
articles.description:

articles.title: How Joe Mazzulla, Brad Stevens reacted to Executive of the Year win
